scripts.pages:build: opennextjs-cloudflare build && shx rm -rf .deploy && shx mkdir -p .deploy && shx cp -r .open-next/assets/* .deploy/ && shx cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/middleware .open-next/server-functions .open-next/.build .deploy/ && shx cp .open-next/worker.js .deploy/_worker.js && shx cp _routes.json .deploy/_routes.json
scripts.deploy: npm run pages:build && npx wrangler pages deploy .deploy --project-name agentgrid
